neighborhoods.name: Caldas da Rainha Centro
neighborhoods.description: Spa town with thermal hospital, daily fruit market, and quirky ceramics heritage including Bordalo Pinheiro
neighborhoods.character: Spa town, ceramics heritage, daily market

housing.predominantType: Apartments and townhouses in the town center

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Caldas da Rainha. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Caldas da Rainha

neighborhoods.name: Sao Martinho do Porto
neighborhoods.description: Shell-shaped bay beach with calm waters, family atmosphere, and growing residential development
neighborhoods.character: Shell bay, calm beach, family residential
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Caldas da Rainha's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Caldas da Rainha

neighborhoods.name: Peniche
neighborhoods.description: Fishing port and surf town on a peninsula with world-class waves and affordable living
neighborhoods.character: Fishing port, world-class surf, affordable peninsula

housing.predominantType: Apartments and houses at lower Silver Coast prices

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Caldas da Rainha

neighborhoods.name: Foz do Arelho / Obidos Lagoon
neighborhoods.description: Lagoon and beach area near medieval Obidos with established expat community
neighborhoods.character: Lagoon beach, medieval Obidos nearby, expat community
neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Caldas da Rainha
